snippet: The Sparr, his son [Steffarion](wiki:Steffarion_Sparr), and «Gormond Goodbrother» meet [Aeron Greyjoy](wiki:Aeron_Greyjoy) to give him the news that [Balon G...
The Sparr was ritually drowned in service to the «Drowned God» as a boy.(wiki:The_Sparr.cite_ref-Raffc1.7B.7B.7B3.7D.7D.7D.7B.7B.7B4.7D.7D...
> I was drowned as a boy, and [my son](wiki:Steffarion_Sparr) upon his «name day» .(wiki:The_Sparr.cite_ref-Raffc1.7B.7B.7B3.7D.7D.7D.7B.7B.7B4.7D.7D.7D_1-5)
